name: clio-mcp
description: MCP server for Clio Manage v4 API. 10 tools for contacts, matters, and activities, with one-call flat-fee matter setup via the custom_rate association.

tools.name: clio_create_matter
tools.description: Create matter; optional flat-fee setup via flat_rate_amount.

tools.name: clio_create_flat_fee_activity
tools.description: Add billable line item (add-on expenses, not the primary flat fee).

tools.name: clio_find_contact
tools.description: Search contacts by name and/or email.

tools.name: clio_find_matter
tools.description: Search matters by display_number, query, or client_id.

tools.name: clio_delete_contact
tools.description: Delete contact (test data cleanup; fails if has open bills).

tools.name: clio_api_request
tools.description: Generic Clio v4 API call escape hatch.
